profile.profile_text:
NAME: Peri Ginsberg
STATUS: Working professional
TARGET ROLES: Graphic Designer
TARGET LOCATIONS: NYC
TIMELINE: Summer 2027
HARD NOs: no commission jobs
STRONG SKILLS: creative, great at understanding mission and requirements, very collaborative approach
BIGGEST CONCERN: competition
ENTRY OPENNESS: Very open
----- PASTED RESUME / BACKGROUND -----
MICHAEL LAZARUS
Graphic Designer
Brooklyn, NY | 561 322 8400 | mikelazdesign@gmail.com | mikelazdesign.com | linkedin.com/in/mlaz
DESIGN FOCUS SUMMARY
Graphic Designer focused on building brand identity and visual systems for startups, media, and consumer facing brands. Executes consistent design across campaigns, rebrands, and launch materials within marketing led teams.
CORE DESIGN CAPABILITIES
Brand identity and visual systems | Brand guidelines and visual direction | Marketing and campaign design | Digital and print production | Social media and paid ad creative | Photography and videography | Pitch decks and sales collateral | Cross functional collaboration
TOOLS
Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign | Canva | Figma (light) | Asana | Monday.com | Microsoft Office | Google Workspace
SELECTED DESIGN EXPERIENCE
Graphic Designer / Brand Manager | Sagemont Advisors and Tax Now  | 2023 – 2024
Designed end-to-end brand identity and visual systems including logos, typography, color palettes, and layout standards for two related tax service brands
Produced pitch decks, trade show booths, banners, and print collateral used across sales and marketing initiatives
Designed paid ad creative and social media assets supporting lead generation campaigns
Partnered with marketing leadership to gather requirements and manage multiple concurrent design deliverables
Prepared production ready files and coordinated with print vendors to ensure accurate execution
Multimedia Designer | Music Choice | 2022 – 2023
Designed themed visual assets for cable television channels and streaming app experiences
Created thumbnails, photo collages, and branded backgrounds for campaign driven content
Produced social media graphics for Instagram and Facebook
Collaborated with marketing, streaming, and IT teams to maintain visual consistency across platforms
Graphic Designer | Liberty Health Sciences | 2020 – 2021
Designed in store signage and educational infographics for cannabis retail locations
Built and maintained a live digital menu displaying product and strain information
Brand Identity Coordinator | Two Degrees App | 2019 – 2020
Supported brand development for an early stage consumer app across digital and physical touchpoints
Designed marketing assets and contributed to visual guidelines used across the platform
Graphic Designer / Bulk Orders Lead | DivvyUp Socks | 2018 – 2019
Designed custom product graphics and edited customer submitted photography for large quantity orders
Served as primary design contact for corporate clients from concept through production
EARLY DESIGN EXPERIENCE
Grova Creative Marketing | Graphic Design Intern | 2018
Florida State University Division of Student Affairs | Intern | Graphic Designer | Sr. Graphic Design | 2015 - 2018
Designed promotional materials and event assets for agency and university clients
Supported campaigns, events, and branded communications
ADDITIONAL EXPERIENCE
Brooklyn Brewery | Bartender | 2024 – Present
Customer facing role in a high traffic hospitality environment
EDUCATION
Florida State University |  Associate degree Studio Art coursework; Dreyfoos School of the Arts | Digital Media coursework

jobText:
Job highlights
Identified by Google from the original job post
Qualifications
3–5 years of graphic design experience, ideally within consumer products, sports, entertainment, or lifestyle brands
A strong portfolio that showcases your ability to merge creativity with brand consistency across digital and physical media
Expertise in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and proficiency in Figma, Sketch, or similar tools
Experience designing across digital channels (email, web, paid media, social) and for physical packaging or printed materials
Deep understanding of layout, composition, typography, and color with a high attention to craft and detail
Ability to manage multiple projects at once, take initiative, and deliver high-quality work on deadline
Benefits
In NYC, the salary range for this position is $70,000- $85,000, which represents base pay only not including any discretionary incentive compensation
In Los Angeles, the salary range for this position is $64,400- $78,200
The listed salary ranges are specific to NYC or Los Angeles and may not be applicable to other locations
When determining base pay, as part of a final compensation package, we consider several factors such as location, experience, qualifications, and training
Responsibilities
As a Graphic Designer at Topps, you will bring the brand’s visual storytelling to life through bold, high-impact design across digital and physical channels
You’ll play a key role in evolving the Topps identity—bridging its heritage with innovative creative that resonates with collectors and fans worldwide
This position will be responsible for handling a wide variety of duties, which include, but are not limited to the ones listed below
Design and execute marketing campaigns, promotional assets, and product visuals across digital, social, and e-commerce channels
Develop brand-right creative that reflects the iconic voice of Topps while pushing visual innovation
Partner with cross-functional teams—including Marketing, Product, and Packaging—to deliver cohesive, campaign-driven creative
Create digital assets such as landing pages, emails, banner ads, and social content for major product drops, events, and releases
Contribute to packaging, insert card design, and print collateral to support physical collectibles
Maintain and evolve the Topps visual identity system and design templates, ensuring consistency across all touchpoints
Work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment where collaboration, initiative, and attention to detail are essential
Provide creative direction and mentorship to other designers as needed
